=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Hadozee — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 6 falling damage. HP: 172/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.

→ Hadozee — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 6 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
